column3: Subtitle
I flew all the way to New York
and waited over an hour in the rain just to
see if this halal food truck lives up to the hype.
And no, it's not halal, guys.
It's a Dell's Halal Food.
And apparently
it's the best halal food truck in the city.
Drenched into pouring rain,
I ordered our combo mixed over rice.
Recommended by the owner.
It comes with chicken and lamb,
some spicy rice,
and that signature cream sauce.
But the question you've been waiting for.
Does it live up to the hype?
I know this sounds dramatic,
but the first bite was like a spiritual experience.
Chunks of ultra tender lamb and chicken
mixed with that incredible cream sauce and spiced rice.
This is definitely worth the wait,
and I'm dancing with joy.",6900000,601100,64500,71500,Adel's Famous Halal Food,"1221 6th Ave, New York, NY 10020, United States",5.56319719442,2
